option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package cat.hajoya.piratasdeandromeda
data class SavedShip( val id: Long, val name: String, )

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@drawable/btnclaro" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDeleteDialogTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:text="@string/delete_ship_dialog_title" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="24sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDeleteDialogMessage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="18sp" tools:text="¿Seguro que quieres eliminar \"Nave Ron Derramado\"?" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnDialogCancel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/btnoscuro" android:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:stateListAnimator="@null" android:text="@string/delete_ship_dialog_cancel" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="18sp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnDialogConfirm" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/btnoscuro" android:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:stateListAnimator="@null" android:text="@string/delete_ship_dialog_confirm" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="18sp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/cardSavedShip" style="@style/Widget.PiratasDeAndromeda.Card" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" >
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvShipName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" android:textSize="18sp" tools:text="Nave viajeros locos" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"/>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/cardSavedShip" style="@style/Widget.PiratasDeAndromeda.Card" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvShipName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" android:textSize="18sp" tools:text="Nave viajeros locos" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/btnDeleteShip" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnDeleteShip" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/btn_icon_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/cd_delete_ship" android:padding="0dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" app:tint="@color/blanco" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/backgroundbasic" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHeroTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/players_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Title" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCodigoLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/players_code_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvHeroTitle" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPartidaCode" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/btnclaro" app:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/players_sample_code" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCodigoLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" tools:text="12345" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPlayersLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/players_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnPartidaCode" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPlayers" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" tools:listitem="@layout/item_room" tools:itemCount="3" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvPlayersLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvImpostoresLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/players_impostores_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/rvPlayers" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/edImpostores" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/edittext" android:hint="@string/players_impostors_hint" android:inputType="number" android:importantForAutofill="no" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:textColor="@color/anaranjado" android:textColorHint="@color/anaranjado" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvImpostoresLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/btn_icon_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/cd_cancel" android:padding="0dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" app:tint="@color/blanco" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnEmpezar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp"android:background="@drawable/btnclaro" app:backgroundTint="@null" android:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/players_start_button" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCancel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/backgroundbasic" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHeroTitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/players_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Title" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCodigoLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/players_code_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvHeroTitle" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPartidaCode" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/btnclaro" app:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/players_sample_code" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCodigoLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" tools:text="12345" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPlayersLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/players_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnPartidaCode" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPlayers" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" tools:listitem="@layout/item_room" tools:itemCount="3" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvPlayersLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvImpostoresLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/players_impostores_label" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Piratas.Section" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/rvPlayers" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/edImpostores" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/edittext" android:hint="@string/players_impostors_hint" android:inputType="number" android:importantForAutofill="no" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:textColor="@color/anaranjado" android:textColorHint="@color/anaranjado" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvImpostoresLabel" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnCancel" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/btn_icon_circle" android:contentDescription="@string/cd_cancel" android:padding="0dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" app:tint="@color/blanco" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnEmpezar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:background="@drawable/btnclaro" app:backgroundTint="@null" android:backgroundTint="@null" android:fontFamily="@font/pirata" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/players_start_button" android:textColor="@color/blanco" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/btnCancel" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Nombre de la App --> <string name="app_name">Piratas de Andromeda</string>
<!-- Textos de la Pantalla de Inicio --> <string name="escape_room">E S C A P E R O O M</string> <string name="titulo_vertical">P I R A T A S\nD E\nA N D R O M E D A</string>
<!-- Textos del Login --> <string name="login">LOGIN</string> <string name="signUp">SIGN UP</string> <string name="usuari">Usuari</string> <string name="correo">Correu</string> <string name="hint_usuari">Introduce tu usuario</string> <string name="contrasenya">Contrasenya</string> <string name="repContrasenya">Repeteix contrasenya</string> <string name="hint_contrasenya">Introduce tu contraseña</string> <string name="login_subrallado"><u>LOGIN</u></string> <string name="signUp_subrallado"><u>SIGN UP</u></string>
<!-- Botones --> <string name="btn_entra">ENTRA</string> <string name="btn_registrate">REGISTRATE</string>
<!-- Pantalla Start FR --> <string name="start_fr_welcome">AAARR!\nBienvenidx a bordo,\nelige tu nave</string> <string name="start_fr_profile_cd">Abrir perfil</string> <string name="start_fr_join_label">Unirme a una partida</string> <string name="start_fr_game_code_hint">Código de partida</string> <string name="start_fr_game_code_cd">Introduce el código de la partida</string> <string name="start_fr_join_button">Unirme</string> <string name="start_fr_join_cd">Unirse a una partida</string> <string name="start_fr_create_label">Crear partida</string> <string name="start_fr_create_button">Crear</string> <string name="start_fr_create_cd">Crear una nueva partida</string>
<!-- Navegacion --> <string name="go_to_register_cd">Ir a registro</string> <string name="go_to_login_cd">Ir a inicio de sesion</string>
<!-- Configuracion de partida --> <string name="cd_planet_background">Fondo de portada</string> <string name="cd_user_avatar">Avatar de usuario</string> <string name="cd_close_session">Cerrar sesion</string> <string name="cd_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="cd_add_room">Agregar habitacion</string> <string name="cd_delete_room">Eliminar habitacion</string>
<string name="config_part_title">AAARR!\nAhora toca ponerla\na la orden!</string> <string name="config_saved_ships">Naves guardadas:</string> <string name="config_ship_name_label">Introduce aqui el nombre de tu nave:</string> <string name="config_ship_name_hint">Ej: Nave Ron Derramado</string> <string name="config_code_label">Introduce el codigo de la partida:</string> <string name="config_code_hint">Codigo de la partida</string> <string name="config_join_button">Unirme</string>
<string name="config_rooms_title">EEEYYY! Cuantos camarotes hay en tu nave?</string> <string name="config_rooms_subtitle">Configura las salas de la nave:</string> <string name="config_room_name_hint">Introduce nombre de habitacion</string> <string name="config_next_button">Siguiente</string>
<string name="players_title">A la borda, que la odisea empieza ya!</string> <string name="players_code_label">Codigo de partida:</string> <string name="players_label">Jugadores a bordo:</string> <string name="players_impostores_label">Numero de impostores</string> <string name="players_impostors_hint">Numero de impostores</string> <string name="players_start_button">Empezar!</string> <string name="players_sample_code">12345</string> <string name="add_symbol">+</string> <string name="config_code_label">Introduce codigo de partida:</string>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Nombre de la App --> <string name="app_name">Piratas de Andromeda</string>
<!-- Textos de la Pantalla de Inicio --> <string name="escape_room">E S C A P E R O O M</string> <string name="titulo_vertical">P I R A T A S\nD E\nA N D R O M E D A</string>
<!-- Textos del Login --> <string name="login">LOGIN</string> <string name="signUp">SIGN UP</string> <string name="usuari">Usuari</string> <string name="correo">Correu</string> <string name="hint_usuari">Introduce tu usuario</string> <string name="contrasenya">Contrasenya</string> <string name="repContrasenya">Repeteix contrasenya</string> <string name="hint_contrasenya">Introduce tu contraseña</string> <string name="login_subrallado"><u>LOGIN</u></string> <string name="signUp_subrallado"><u>SIGN UP</u></string>
<!-- Botones --> <string name="btn_entra">ENTRA</string> <string name="btn_registrate">REGISTRATE</string>
<!-- Pantalla Start FR --> <string name="start_fr_welcome">AAARR!\nBienvenidx a bordo,\nelige tu nave</string> <string name="start_fr_profile_cd">Abrir perfil</string> <string name="start_fr_join_label">Unirme a una partida</string> <string name="start_fr_game_code_hint">Código de partida</string> <string name="start_fr_game_code_cd">Introduce el código de la partida</string> <string name="start_fr_join_button">Unirme</string> <string name="start_fr_join_cd">Unirse a una partida</string> <string name="start_fr_create_label">Crear partida</string> <string name="start_fr_create_button">Crear</string> <string name="start_fr_create_cd">Crear una nueva partida</string>
<!-- Navegacion --> <string name="go_to_register_cd">Ir a registro</string> <string name="go_to_login_cd">Ir a inicio de sesion</string>
<!-- Configuracion de partida --> <string name="cd_planet_background">Fondo de portada</string> <string name="cd_user_avatar">Avatar de usuario</string> <string name="cd_close_session">Cerrar sesion</string> <string name="cd_cancel">Cancelar</string> <string name="cd_add_room">Agregar habitacion</string> <string name="cd_delete_room">Eliminar habitacion</string>
<string name="config_part_title">AAARR!\nAhora toca ponerla\na la orden!</string> <string name="config_saved_ships">Naves guardadas:</string> <string name="config_ship_name_label">Introduce aqui el nombre de tu nave:</string> <string name="config_ship_name_hint">Ej: Nave Ron Derramado</string> <string name="config_code_label">Introduce el codigo de la partida:</string> <string name="config_code_hint">Codigo de la partida</string> <string name="config_join_button">Unirme</string>
<string name="config_rooms_title">EEEYYY! Cuantos camarotes hay en tu nave?</string> <string name="config_rooms_subtitle">Configura las salas de la nave:</string> <string name="config_room_name_hint">Introduce nombre de habitacion</string> <string name="config_next_button">Siguiente</string>
<string name="players_title">A la borda, que la odisea empieza ya!</string> <string name="players_code_label">Codigo de partida:</string> <string name="players_label">Jugadores a bordo:</string> <string name="players_impostores_label">Numero de impostores</string> <string name="players_impostors_hint">Numero de impostores</string> <string name="players_start_button">Empezar!</string> <string name="players_sample_code">12345</string> <string name="add_symbol">+</string> <string name="config_code_label">Introduce codigo de partida:</string>
<!-- Naves guardadas --> <string name="cd_delete_ship">Eliminar nave guardada</string> <string name="delete_ship_dialog_title">Confirmar borrado</string> <string name="delete_ship_dialog_message">¿Seguro que quieres eliminar "%1$s"?</string> <string name="delete_ship_dialog_confirm">Aceptar</string> <string name="delete_ship_dialog_cancel">Cancelar</string>
</resources>
